property.description: Detect abnormal surges of registration signaling

event.description: NGAP InitialUEMessage or UplinkNASTransport with NAS RegistrationRequest

property.if_satisfied: raise_alert("Abnormal UE Registration Surge", "Time Window: %s ms, Observed Rate: %d req/s, Affected GNB: %s", timestamp_window, observed_rate, ngap.gnb_id)
